     The Numbers Business Report

Chappie (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,569,268Details
International Box Office $73,432,788
Worldwide Box Office $105,002,056
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,776,771
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,851,803
Total $11,628,574
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In the near future, crime is patrolled by an oppressive mechanized police force. But now, the people are fighting back. When one police droid, Chappie, is stolen and given new programming, he becomes the first robot with the ability to think and feel for himself. As powerful, destructive forces start to see Chappie as a danger to mankind and order, they will stop at nothing to maintain the status quo and ensure that Chappie is the last of his kind.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,346,782 (42.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.37 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:30.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$49,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,201 opening theaters/3,201 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $44,788,669

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 6th, 2015 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
March 6th, 2015 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: March 4th, 2015 (Wide) (Indonesia)
March 4th, 2015 (Wide) (Thailand)
March 4th, 2015 (Wide) (France)
March 5th, 2015 (Wide) (Chile)
March 5th, 2015 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: May 29th, 2015 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence, language and brief nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2360, 2/11/2015)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: South Africa
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Corrupt Cops, Crime, Gangs, Robot
Social setting: Dystopia
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, MRC, LStar Capital
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

In the near future, crime is patrolled by an oppressive mechanized police force. But now, the people are fighting back. When one police droid, Chappie, is stolen and given new programming, he becomes the first robot with the ability to think and feel for himself. As powerful, destructive forces start to see Chappie as a danger to mankind and order, they will stop at nothing to maintain the status quo and ensure that Chappie is the last of his kind.
